candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; appears as the operating revenue line and matches the total revenue values.
Also a direct revenue label, but appears duplicative of Operating revenues.
COGS, not revenue.
Non-operating associate result, not revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Finance result, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Net income-related line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using both revenue labels as a priority list because they are identical top-line labels and appear to be duplicates across reporting formats.

candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line and a strong COGS proxy in several years.
Explicit COGS label and strongest semantic match, though only populated in the most recent year preview.
Balance sheet inventory component, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit COGS line. 'Cost of materials' is also relevant historically, but to avoid potential double counting from parallel labels, the exact COGS row is preferred.

candidates.why: Valid SG&A-type component, but only one part of overhead.
Balance sheet asset/intangible-related label, not an expense line.
Balance sheet label, not income statement overhead expense.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization should be excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: Candidate list clearly missed the main overhead rows. No explicit SG&A total row exists. Chose best operating-overhead components from the full income statement preview: 'Operating cost' appears to be the main overhead bucket in some years, while 'Payroll expense', 'Marketing, freight, and commissions', 'IR expenses', and 'Travel expenses' provide coverage in years where costs are split out. Excluded totals, balancing rows, depreciation/amortization, COGS, and transaction/acquisition costs. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Operating cost, [Income Statement] Payroll expense, [Income Statement] IR expenses, [Income Statement] Travel expenses

candidates.why: Balance sheet label, not an income statement R&D expense row.

variables.notes: No suitable dedicated R&D expense line appears on the income statement preview.

candidates.why: Broad finance expense total that includes interest and other finance items; usable only if components are unavailable.
Direct recurring interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component related to lease liabilities.
Recurring finance-cost component; suitable to include alongside interest components.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; should not be used with the main line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components and excluded the broader total 'Financial expenses' to avoid double counting. Excluded FX/fair value/impairment items and excluded the supplemental duplicate lease-interest line.

candidates.row_label: Investments in associates accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Asset line, not book equity.
Direct equity line; valid book equity candidate.
Direct equity line; valid book equity candidate.
Balancing/subtotal line, not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: No parent-only equity or non-controlling interest line is visible, so total equity is the best available BE measure. Included both capitalization variants as a priority list.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the balance sheet preview; with BE mapped to total equity, MIB is set to empty to avoid double counting.
